servicesPage.intro: From minor repairs to major renovations, HandyTeddy offers a full range of handyman services in Dallas, TX. Each service is backed by our commitment to quality, reliability, and customer satisfaction.

services.title: General Repairs & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Fix it and forget it – we handle all those nagging repairs around your home or office.
services.longDescription: Our general repair service covers everything from fixing leaky faucets and unclogging drains to repairing drywall, patching holes, and replacing light fixtures. We use quality parts and materials to ensure long-lasting results, and we always clean up after ourselves. Whether it’s a single repair or a list of to-dos, we’ll get it done efficiently.
benefits: Quick, same-day service for urgent repairs
All work guaranteed – we stand behind our fixes
No job too small – we handle odd jobs with the same care as large projects

process.title: Inspection & Estimate
process.description: We assess the issue, explain the solution, and provide a clear, upfront price.

process.title: Expert Repair
process.description: Our skilled technicians perform the repair using proper tools and quality materials.

process.title: Final Walkthrough
process.description: We test everything, clean the area, and ensure you’re completely satisfied.

faqs.question: Do you charge for estimates?
faqs.answer: No, all estimates are free. We’ll come out, assess the job, and give you a firm price with no obligation.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to an emergency repair?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day service for urgent repairs. Call us by 2pm and we’ll typically be there that day.

services.title: Interior Painting & Drywall
services.shortDescription: Transform your space with a fresh coat of paint and flawless drywall finishing.
services.longDescription: Our painting and drywall service gives your interiors a professional, polished look. We handle everything from patching small holes to full-room painting. Our team prepares surfaces meticulously, uses premium paints, and ensures clean lines. Whether you want to refresh a single room or repaint your entire home, we deliver a smooth, durable finish.
benefits: Premium paints and materials for lasting beauty
Meticulous prep – sanding, priming, and caulking for a flawless result
Minimal mess – we protect floors and furniture, and clean up thoroughly

process.title: Color Consultation
process.description: We help you choose the perfect colors and finishes for your space.

process.title: Surface Preparation
process.description: We repair drywall, sand, prime, and tape edges for a perfect canvas.

process.title: Professional Painting
process.description: Our painters apply even coats with precision, then do a final inspection.

faqs.question: Do you provide paint, or do I need to buy it?
faqs.answer: We can supply the paint or work with paint you’ve already purchased. We’ll recommend the best type for your project.

faqs.question: How long does it take to paint a standard bedroom?
faqs.answer: Typically one to two days, depending on the size and condition of the walls. We’ll give you a precise timeline during the estimate.

services.title: Carpentry & Custom Woodwork
services.shortDescription: Custom shelves, trim, and built-ins that add character and function to your home.
services.longDescription: Our carpentry services bring your vision to life. From custom bookshelves and window seats to crown molding and wainscoting, we craft high-quality woodwork that fits your style and space. We use solid woods and premium materials, and every piece is built to last. Whether you need a simple repair or a custom built-in, our carpenters deliver precision and artistry.
benefits: Custom designs tailored to your home and needs
Quality craftsmanship with attention to detail
Adds value and charm to your property

process.title: Design & Planning
process.description: We discuss your ideas, take measurements, and create a design plan with material options.

process.title: Fabrication & Installation
process.description: Our carpenters build and install the piece, ensuring a perfect fit and finish.

process.title: Final Staining & Sealing
process.description: We apply stain, paint, or sealant to protect the wood and enhance its beauty.

faqs.question: Can you match existing trim or moldings?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can replicate most profiles and stains to seamlessly blend with your existing woodwork.

faqs.question: Do you build custom furniture like tables or desks?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We can design and build custom furniture pieces to your specifications.

services.title: Bathroom & Kitchen Renovations
services.shortDescription: Full or partial remodels that transform your most-used rooms into stunning spaces.
services.longDescription: HandyTeddy handles complete bathroom and kitchen renovations, from design to completion. We manage all aspects: demolition, plumbing, electrical, tile, cabinetry, countertops, and fixtures. Our team coordinates with licensed specialists as needed, ensuring a smooth, stress-free experience. Whether you want a simple update or a full gut renovation, we’ll deliver a beautiful, functional space on time and within budget.
benefits: Single point of contact – we manage the entire project
Custom designs that reflect your style

process.title: Design & Planning
process.description: We discuss your goals, take measurements, and create a detailed plan with material selections.

process.title: Demolition & Preparation
process.description: We carefully remove old fixtures and prepare the space for new installations.

process.title: Installation & Finishing
process.description: Our team installs all components, from plumbing to tile, and completes final touches.

faqs.question: How long does a typical bathroom renovation take?
faqs.answer: Most bathroom remodels take 2-3 weeks, depending on scope. We’ll provide a detailed timeline upfront.

faqs.question: Do you handle permits and inspections?
faqs.answer: Yes, we obtain all necessary permits and schedule inspections to ensure your renovation meets local codes.

about.headline: Your Trusted Handyman in Dallas
about.mission: HandyTeddy’s mission is simple: provide Dallas homeowners and businesses with reliable, high-quality handyman services that make life easier. We believe in honest work, fair pricing, and lasting relationships.
story: HandyTeddy was founded in 2012 by Teddy Martinez, a Dallas native with a passion for fixing things and helping neighbors. What started as a one-man operation fixing leaky faucets and patching drywall quickly grew into a trusted team of skilled craftsmen. Teddy’s philosophy – treat every home like your own – became the cornerstone of the company’s reputation.

Today, HandyTeddy serves the entire Dallas metro area, from Lakewood to Uptown. Our team has grown, but our values haven’t changed. We still show up on time, communicate clearly, and take pride in every job. Whether it’s a small repair or a major renovation, we treat your home with the same care we’d give our own.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say. Honest estimates, transparent pricing, and no shortcuts.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We take pride in every project, big or small. Quality is never compromised.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We respect your home, your time, and your budget. Clean, punctual, and courteous service.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We’re locals serving locals. Supporting our neighbors is at the heart of what we do.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with HandyTeddy
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your project? Give us a call or fill out the form below. We’ll get back to you within 24 hours.
